questions.question_text:
Choose the correct option for editing:
Electricity is express by the amount of charge flowing through the particular area in unit time. Electricity is a necessity to modern civilization.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Paper were first made by the Egyptians from the plant named papyrus. For a long time, papyrus was used extensively as writing material before the Chinese perfected the processes.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Commonwealth golds medalist Heena Kumari used to watch her uncle repair all kinds of guns in her neighbourhood and developed a fancy for it.

Choose the correct option for editing:
In April 12, 1961, major Yuri Gagarin became the first man ever to venture into space. He did not know for certain beforehand that he was to be chosen.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Books help us knew more about our civilization. Through books, we come in contact with great scholars, poets and philosophers.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Educationist today are overwhelmingly concerned about the future of the youngsters. The common complaint is students don't study, they are not interested.

Choose the correct option for editing:
By reading books, our knowledge is elevated. If us are on a long journey, books give us good company.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Electricity is supplied to a house through cables. In cities, a cables are usually laid underground, but in towns and villages they may be carried on poles.

Choose the correct option for editing:
I had to went out despite the heavy rain outside to get some medicine.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Ones there was a King who thought only about himself. He only talked about his own charms and conquests in the court all day.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Leaves of trees turns from green to vibrant red, yellow and orange. Almost every morning, the temperature reaches the freezing point.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Autumn are the season that falls between summer and winter.

Choose the correct option for editing:
It is true a natural disaster was a natural process and we cannot stop it, but by making certain preparations, we can reduce the magnitude of the loss to life or property.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Banana is an popular fruit and an important part of our diet today. It originally belonged to the South Aisa region where it used to grow wild in the forest.

Choose the correct option for editing:
Robinson used to spend hours gazing on merchant ships.
